untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-leg options analysis (calendar spread of straddles with specific credit/debit ratios and strike proximity). The allowed indicators do not support: (1) options premium calculations, (2) near-term vs long-term option pricing comparison, (3) credit vs debit ratio analysis for multi-leg spreads. These are derivatives pricing concepts beyond standard price/technical indicators.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_151 is an options strategy signal requiring evaluation of option chain data (straddle premiums, strike prices, time decay) rather than price action or technical indicators. To implement this signal, a backtest engine would need options-specific indicators such as: implied_volatility, option_premium_short_term, option_premium_long_term, days_to_expiration, and the ability to calculate spreads across multiple strikes and expirations.
